title: Began B.Tech, Metallurgical & Materials Engineering
description: Started at Visvesvaraya National Institute of Technology (VNIT), Nagpur.

title: Investment Casting with 3D-Printed Wax Patterns
description: Explored investment casting using additively manufactured wax patterns as an alternative to traditional pattern-making.

title: Aluminium Scrap Recycling Study
description: Worked on recovery and characterization of recycled aluminium, connecting scrap quality to processing parameters.

title: Mechanical Testing & Fracture Mechanics
description: Hands-on mechanical testing and fracture mechanics analysis — the foundation for later failure-analysis-oriented work.

title: Graduated — B.Tech, Metallurgical & Materials Engineering, VNIT Nagpur
description: Completed the degree with a focus on physical metallurgy and materials characterization.

title: FDM PETG vs. PETG-CF Research Paper
description: Full factorial study (2 materials × 3 layer thicknesses × 3 infill densities) on FDM-printed PETG and PETG-CF, tested per ASTM D638 with DIC strain mapping and SEM fractography. Investigating whether carbon-fiber reinforcement changes the deformation and failure mechanism, not just the numbers.

title: Materials R&D / Failure Analysis Role
description: Looking for hands-on roles in materials R&D, failure analysis, semiconductor materials, or advanced manufacturing.
